description_long: This object is a circular stone platform featuring four prominent green marble-like pedestals, each topped with a sharp, ivory-colored spike. The platform is constructed from large, irregular gray stone slabs, forming a ring around a central disk. The outer ring is inscribed with glowing blue runes or symbols, giving the structure a mystical or arcane appearance. The green pedestals are evenly spaced and have swirling patterns, adding to the decorative and enigmatic design. The central area is slightly raised and also displays intricate circular motifs. The overall look suggests a ceremonial or magical function, possibly as a ritual site or monument.
description: A circular stone platform with four green, spiked pedestals and glowing blue runic inscriptions, exuding a mystical, ceremonial aura.
description_view_0: The front view highlights three of the four spiked pedestals, with the runic inscriptions on the stone ring clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the platform from a slight angle, revealing more of the leftmost pedestal and the continuity of the runic symbols.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back two pedestals most prominently, with the runes and central disk still visible.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the rightmost pedestal and provides a clear look at the circular motifs in the center.
attribute_inscription: Glowing blue runic inscriptions encircle the outer stone ring, written in a stylized, arcane script. The symbols are evenly spaced and highly legible, though the language is unknown.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative swirling patterns are present on the green pedestals, and the central disk features intricate circular motifs. The runic inscriptions also serve as ornamentation.
attribute_base_design: The base is a wide, circular platform made of large, irregular gray stone slabs, forming a ring with a slightly raised central disk. The outer edge is decorated with runic inscriptions.
attribute_tip_design: Each pedestal is topped with a sharp, conical ivory-colored spike, smooth and pointed, with no additional decoration.
